title: AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING - 211info
text: HOMES FOR GOOD AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable housing complexes. 100 W 13th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 682-3755 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 682-3755 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - PUBLIC HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
